status_legend.in_progress: The feature is the current active task.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: Required verification has passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: Chapter 1 game lesson schema and sample data
features.user_visible_behavior: The RPG can load Chapter 1: Mana Crystals with tutorial content, spellbook pages, battles, side quests, hints, accepted answers, and a boss fight.
verification: Confirm shared/schemas/gameLesson.schema.json exists.
Confirm lessons/game/chapter-1-mana-crystals.json exists.
Confirm every battle challenge has acceptedAnswers and hints.
Confirm spell damage/heal/block/mana values are fixed or capped in JSON.
evidence: Chapter data is consumed by the React game flow.
Frontend build passed with npm run build on 2026-06-19.

features.title: Turn-based coding battle engine
features.user_visible_behavior: Correct answers trigger configured spell effects; wrong answers do not apply spell effects and cause a stronger enemy counter.
verification: Run frontend build.
Review src/game/battle/battleEngine.ts.
Confirm typed answers only decide validation success or failure.
Confirm damage, heal, block, and mana gain values come from spell config.
evidence: Battle UI uses submitAnswer and applyEnemyTurn from the engine.
Frontend build passed with npm run build on 2026-06-19.
features.notes: Do not allow user input to set uncapped damage.

features.title: Playable JRPG battle screen
features.user_visible_behavior: The player chooses the Glow spell, completes the code chant, casts, sees the projectile hit, and sees HP update on impact.
verification: Run npm run build from frontend.
Open the app with npm run dev.
Start the first battle.
Submit a correct answer and verify the projectile impact happens before HP changes.
Submit a wrong answer and verify no spell effect is applied.
evidence: Manual browser feel check still recommended after asset and layout changes.
features.notes: Current enemy asset integration uses skeleton soldier sprites.

features.title: Tutorial, spellbook, and owl hint flow
features.user_visible_behavior: The learner sees tutorial content, can open the flipping spellbook, and can click the owl for one hint at a time.
verification: Run npm run build from frontend.
Start the app and enter Chapter 1.
Open and close the spellbook.
Click the owl and verify hints reveal one at a time.
evidence: Spellbook and owl components are wired into BattleScreen.
Frontend build passed with npm run build on 2026-06-19.
features.notes: AI is intentionally mocked/scripted for now.

features.title: World map, side quests, boss unlock, and local progress
features.user_visible_behavior: Progress persists in localStorage, side quests can complete, and the boss unlocks after tutorial, one normal battle, and three side quests.
verification: Run npm run build from frontend.
Complete tutorial, one battle, and three side quests.
Refresh and verify progress persists.
Verify boss node unlocks.
evidence: progressStore, WorldMap, SideQuestScreen, and ChapterFlow are present.
Frontend build passed with npm run build on 2026-06-19.
features.notes: No auth, database, or server persistence.

features.title: JRPG feel, assets, animation timing, and layout polish
features.user_visible_behavior: The battle feels like a real JRPG loop: choose spell, chant code, cast, projectile hits, enemy responds, and sprites show clear pose changes.
verification: Run npm run build from frontend.
Open the app with npm run dev.
Play the first battle at desktop size.
Verify no key UI elements overlap.
Verify skeleton idle, hurt, attack, defeated, and victory poses render at the right times.
evidence: Skeleton assets were integrated and npm run build passed on 2026-06-19.
features.notes: Manual browser/feel check is the next best action.

features.title: Optional RPG-to-runtime integration
features.user_visible_behavior: Future coding challenges may call the existing FastAPI /api/v1/run endpoint for controlled Python execution when the product is ready.
verification: Confirm backend /health works.
Confirm /api/v1/run remains controlled and documented.
Confirm child-facing UI does not expose raw runtime JSON.
features.notes: Do not add this until the battle UX is stable.
